{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032121562202848B63130D81DE173E"}"},"total":12807},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7065116726291743495","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这里的人都是有智商，有想法，有情感的，男主工于心计，逻辑严密，各种计谋层出不穷，令人大为惊叹，却不让人感到心塞憋气，确实值得一看。（愣是把爽文写成了悬疑推理）","text_exts":[{"e":78,"s":74,"text":"悬疑推理","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%82%AC%E7%96%91%E6%8E%A8%E7%90%86&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177410138281DE173E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227065116726291743495%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226873306570621455367%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%82%AC%E7%96%91%E6%8E%A8%E7%90%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1644975679,"group_id":"6873306570621455367","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1Om9MhbkMX5m0tYFg+U12ukowFix1Jr59mhG4l2jWaM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/63481086a33040299c787162da671a35~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615504&x-signature=UlM09LWL9w9%2B%2F%2BkZPq2xsQajfDM%3D","user_id":"2225826230174904","user_name":"world 67"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2225826230174904","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6873306570621455367","book_info":{"abstract":"卧槽！天命之子点名要干我？
身边美人看我的眼神也怪怪的？怎么办？我好慌啊！
难道我们反派就注定要给人当踏脚石吗？
我不，我偏不，我凌霄就要把你们这些狗屁主角统统踩在脚下！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/b969514f3890628b596bbd6f2fdef759","author":"孤山有狸","author_id":"","book_id":"6873306570621455367","book_name":"满级反派，圣女求我别杀她道侣","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#483020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6873306574253722638","read_count":"37210","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"9665326"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"4621","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/76202a56b3379ba570b58698c22a2b8d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285382&x-signature=Q3fTTXPDg2x5qqTx1A1o1ZFRGf0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3535646458389629","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.00844787e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032121562202848B63130D81DE173E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读56小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":30,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":107,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":200950,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":75108},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7092721513396912909","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"迟到的五星。唯一一本追的反派文，作者笔力文采深度没的说，给我带来了很多思考，人物塑造鲜活。也许开始就注定了结局：其兴也勃焉，其亡也忽焉。修仙如做人，哪有什么神魔，都说魔自由潇洒，肆意妄为，岂不知公子步步算计不敢露出真面目。每个人心中都有一个公子，这世上，有该做的，有不该做的，有能说的，有不能说的，有能做不能说的，有能说不能做的，还有不能说也不能做的，世俗之下，何谈逍遥？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1651402918,"group_id":"6873306570621455367","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"向死而生，活在当下，活在永恒","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1tfWQd+hQJCSBJijuLyqy4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619584&x-signature=COIg0Cf24es9cyIKjPOtpxTq078%3D","user_id":"184318176536541","user_name":"行舟绿水中"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"184318176536541","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1643035256,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6873306570621455367","book_in
